name: Founder's Office
description: Strategic ownership of products and the founding team's operational hub

roles.title: Product-Specific Intern
roles.about: This is EduRankAI's most ambitious internship. You will be handed full ownership of a real product — not a side project, not a feature, but an entire product within the EduRankAI ecosystem. You are responsible for building it, launching it, and generating revenue from it. Upon successful completion and revenue generation, exceptional performance will be rewarded.
responsibilities: Take complete ownership of an assigned product from concept to launch
Define the product roadmap, scope, and success metrics independently
Design, build, or coordinate the technical development of the product
Own go-to-market: positioning, outreach, and user acquisition
Drive the product to generate its first revenue
Report weekly to the Founder's Office with progress, blockers, and metrics
Iterate rapidly based on user feedback and performance data
eligibility: Any educational background — what matters is hunger and capability
Must be able to commit seriously: this is not a passive internship
Should have a demonstrated ability to build, ship, or create something
Comfort with ambiguity and working with minimal supervision
Strong written and verbal communication in English

roles.title: Managing Intern
roles.about: The Managing Intern sits at the heart of EduRankAI's internship programme, acting as the operational hub between the Founder's Office and the wider intern cohort. You will coordinate tasks, track deliverables, resolve blockers, and ensure the intern programme runs smoothly.
responsibilities: Coordinate daily and weekly tasks across the intern cohort
Onboard new interns and orient them to processes and expectations
Track deliverable progress and flag delays to the Founder's Office
Facilitate standups, check-ins, and inter-team communication
Maintain intern documentation: rosters, schedules, and output logs
Serve as the first point of contact for intern queries and issues
eligibility: Pursuing or recently completed any undergraduate degree
Demonstrated experience organising people or projects
High emotional intelligence and ability to manage peers
Strong written English and structured thinking
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

roles.title: Intern
roles.about: A general-purpose intern embedded directly in the Founder's Office — supporting the founding team across whatever is most needed. This role is deliberately broad and suits someone adaptable, switched-on, and eager to learn how an early-stage AI company actually operates.
responsibilities: Support the founding team with research, analysis, and ad-hoc tasks
Draft summaries, memos, presentations, and briefing documents
Track action items from founder meetings and follow up on open tasks
Assist with external communications, outreach, and scheduling
Conduct competitive research and surface relevant insights
eligibility: Pursuing or recently completed any undergraduate degree
Highly adaptable and comfortable with changing priorities
Strong written English — clear, concise, and professional
Proactive: you spot things that need doing and do them
Availability: 2.5 hrs/day, 5 days/week

name: Executive Leadership
description: C-suite leadership setting vision and execution at the top

roles.title: CEO
roles.about: Own the overall vision, strategy, and execution of EduRankAI. The CEO sets the direction for everything the company does, builds the team, and is ultimately responsible for outcomes.
responsibilities: Set and communicate EduRankAI's mission, vision, and long-term strategy
Build and lead the executive leadership team
Own fundraising, investor relations, and board management
Make high-stakes decisions on product, people, and partnerships
Represent EduRankAI externally to media, partners, and the public
Foster a culture of excellence, integrity, and purpose
eligibility: Proven entrepreneurial or executive leadership experience
Deep understanding of AI, EdTech, or technology sectors
Track record of building and scaling teams and organisations
Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills

roles.title: COO
roles.about: The COO owns operational excellence at EduRankAI — ensuring that strategy is executed, teams are aligned, and the business runs efficiently as it scales.
responsibilities: Translate CEO vision into operational plans and execution
Own company-wide OKRs and performance management
Build and optimise internal processes and workflows
Manage cross-functional coordination across all teams
Identify and remove operational bottlenecks
Build the operations team as the company scales
eligibility: 8+ years in operations, strategy, or management consulting
Experience in a scaling startup or technology company
Strong process design and analytical skills
Excellent cross-functional leadership and communication

roles.title: CSO
roles.about: The Chief Strategy Officer owns EduRankAI's long-term strategic positioning, competitive intelligence, and growth initiatives.
responsibilities: Define and own EduRankAI's long-term strategic roadmap
Lead market research and competitive intelligence
Evaluate new markets, partnerships, and business models
Support the CEO with board materials and investor narratives
Drive strategic planning cycles across the organisation
Identify and pursue high-value strategic opportunities
eligibility: 8+ years in strategy, consulting, or corporate development
Experience in AI, technology, or education sectors preferred
MBA or equivalent strategic training
Exceptional analytical and communication skills

roles.title: Chief Revenue Officer
roles.about: The CRO owns EduRankAI's revenue strategy — from sales and partnerships to pricing and growth.
responsibilities: Own the end-to-end revenue strategy and pipeline
Build and lead sales, partnerships, and business development functions
Define pricing models and revenue streams
Work closely with product and marketing on go-to-market
Establish revenue forecasting and reporting systems
Hire and develop a high-performance revenue team
eligibility: 8+ years in revenue, sales, or business development leadership
Experience scaling revenue in SaaS, EdTech, or AI companies
Strong network in education or technology sectors
Data-driven approach to revenue management
